function.arguments: {"cards":[0,1,2,4,5],"reasoning":"Play pair of Queens (indices 0 and 1) plus three low cards (C_T index 2, H_5 index 4, D_5 index 5) to score 60 chips, preserving the two spades (S_4 index 6 and S_6 index 3) for a future spade flush.   \text{Score}=30\times14=420
  \]
  This gives a strong start toward the 600‑point target, and the drawn cards will allow us to try for a high‑scoring second hand (ideally a Straight or a Flush).*
